inline_comments.message: Jess - I suppose this should contain only current repository? If intended, pls clarify what is the benefit of listing all other repo here.
We list all repos where the mentioned committers have permissions to commit.

Thanks for all the updates! Have a follow-up ques on repo list - if intended to identify committers permission - then this PR list will be incorrect - https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/46083/3/INFO.yaml; as one of the committer doesn't have access outside of two repo on that list.

I think this is a corner case in DCAEGEN since all committers have access to all repos except Przemyslaw Wasala who just has permissions to 2 of them. 

For https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/46083/ and https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/57767 we can remove the repo list to make it less confusing, or add some sort of note in
Przemyslaw Wasala's name. 

The reason why I added the repo list is becuase we have a verification in place that will mark this change as failed if there is no repos section at all.
Okay. understood. Yeah, so we can update those 2 PR to add note to indicate. All other info looks good to me; will approve them. Thanks again for your support!
